title: Potter County — Three paving procurements in 28 days
body: RFB #1280-26 for asphalt opened March 9. Follows RFB #1279-26 (road materials, awarded Feb 23) and a $111,811 contract awarded in February. Three cycles this fast signals a spring road maintenance pipeline.
action: Call Potter County Purchasing at (806) 379-2275. Confirm next solicitation timeline and get on the bid notification list.

title: TCEQ stormwater permit filed — construction not yet public
body: Environmental clearance is required before construction begins. This permit means a project is in planning that hasn't appeared on any bid list, plan room, or trade newsletter. The permit names the operator and site.
action: Contact the permit holder directly. They're planning construction and haven't selected contractors yet. You have no competition.

title: Xcel Energy — $99.3M battery storage PPA filed with PUCT
body: Xcel filed a power purchase agreement for NextEra battery storage in the Panhandle. PUCT Docket 59034. This is the largest capital deployment signal in the region this quarter. Battery projects require civil work, electrical, and site prep.
action: Email Xcel Energy Texas regulatory affairs team. Reference Docket 59034 and request the vendor qualification process.

title: Amarillo ISD — Roof and HVAC contractor selection underway
body: CSP 4063 for roof replacement and HVAC work at De Zavala, Humphrey's Highland, and Mesa Verde campuses is in the contractor ranking phase. Sub-bid lists typically close 10-14 days after GC notification.
action: Call AISD Maintenance and Construction at (806) 326-1000 to identify the GC selected and request the mechanical sub-bid package.

title: City of Amarillo — Aquatic facility assessment RFQ posted
body: RFQ 306-26 KD for aquatic facility assessment due April 2, 2026. This study precedes a potential $5M-$15M capital investment in recreation infrastructure. The winning consultant will recommend financing structures 12-18 months before construction.
action: Monitor Bonfire portal for the award announcement. Contact the winning consultant to position for the eventual construction financing.

title: BSA Health System — Encompass Health rehabilitation facility opened
body: New inpatient rehabilitation hospital opened in partnership with Encompass Health. New healthcare facilities generate vendor procurement cycles for equipment, services, and facility maintenance within 6-12 months of opening.
action: Email BSA facilities management to offer pavement maintenance, mechanical services, or equipment supply for the new facility.
